pattern: Greedily hand out as many full 8-dollar shares as the budget allows, then check whether the leftover money and remaining kids can absorb the change without forcing a forbidden 4-dollar share.
hints: Every child needs at least a dollar, so the first sanity check is whether there's even enough money to go around.
Try to give as many children exactly 8 dollars as the total allows, then look at what's left over for the rest.
If handing out the maximum possible number of 8s leaves an amount that can't be split among the remaining children without landing exactly on 4, give one fewer child the full 8 and recheck.

edge_inputs.description: leftover of exactly 4 with one child remaining, must back off one 8-share
money splits evenly into 8s with nothing left over
not enough money for everyone to get even a dollar
minimum money, every child gets exactly one dollar
single dollar per child, none left for an 8-share
money is one dollar short of a clean multiple of 8 per child
giving every child but one a full 8 forces exactly 4 on the last child
far more money than 8 times the number of children

stress.description: random money/children pairs across the full small domain
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    children = rng.randint(2, 30)
    money = rng.randint(1, 200)
    return [money, children]
